description: In {{ofp}} it returns the commander of a vehicle. Since {{arma1}} it returns the primary observer. The commander of a vehicle can be found with [[effectiveCommander]].
examples:
Detect if player is in commander turret of a vehicle:
<sqf>_isVehicleCommander = player isEqualTo commander objectParent player;</sqf>
name: commander

ret.desc: the unit sitting in the commander place is returned. If vehicle is not a vehicle but a person, the person is returned.
